---
title: Home
format: html
---


# COMP 331: AI-Assisted Software Engineering

Welcome to the course! Use the links below to access key documents and lectures.

## Course Documents

- [Course Orientation](docs/course_orientation.ipynb)
- [Syllabus](docs/syllabus.ipynb)
- [Tool Setup Guide](docs/tool_setup.ipynb)

## Assignments

- [Assignment 1: Environment Setup & AI-Assisted SWE Foundations](assignments/assignment01.ipynb)
- [Weekly AI Interaction Log](assignments/weekly_ai_interaction_log.ipynb)
- [Lab 1: Structured AI Workflow](assignments/lab01_structured_ai_workflow.ipynb)
- [Lab 2: Eval-Driven Development](assignments/lab02_eval_driven_development.ipynb)
- [Lab 3: AI System Implementation](assignments/lab03_ai_system_implementation.ipynb)
- [Lab 4: AI Risk Analysis and Production Readiness](assignments/lab04_risk_analysis_production_readiness.ipynb)
- [Lab 5: Coding Agents and Controlled Workflows](assignments/lab05_coding_agents_controlled_workflows.ipynb)
- [Final Project Milestone 1: Proposal & Architecture](assignments/final_project_milestone01.ipynb)
- [Final Project Milestone 2: Partial Implementation, Evaluation Strategy, and Identified Risks](assignments/final_project_milestone02.ipynb)
- [Final Project Final Submission: Complete System, Documentation, Evaluation Report, and Demo](assignments/final_project_final_submission.ipynb)

## Lectures

Lectures are available as Jupyter notebooks:


- [Lecture 1](lectures/lecture01.ipynb)
- [Lecture 2, Part 1](lectures/lecture02_part1.ipynb)
- [Lecture 2, Part 2](lectures/lecture02_part2.ipynb)
- [Lecture 3](lectures/lecture03.ipynb)
- [Lecture 4](lectures/lecture04.ipynb)
- [Lecture 5](lectures/lecture05.ipynb)
- [Lecture 6](lectures/lecture06.ipynb)
- [Lecture 7](lectures/lecture07.ipynb)
- [Lecture 8](lectures/lecture08.ipynb)
- [Lecture 9](lectures/lecture09.ipynb)
- [Lecture 10](lectures/lecture10.ipynb)
- [Lecture 11](lectures/lecture11.ipynb)
- [Lecture 12](lectures/lecture12.ipynb)

---
For more information, see the [Quarto documentation](https://quarto.org/docs/presentations/revealjs/).
